details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster (get all, describe pod, get deployment yaml, get svc) and produced a complete, accurate diagnosis. It correctly identified: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False and ProgressDeadlineExceeded, (2) the root cause is the non-existent image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist causing ImagePullBackOff, (3) the old v1 ReplicaSet (checkout-5d9c45985) remains fully active with 3/3 ready pods serving traffic while the new v2 ReplicaSet (checkout-7877c44d95) has 0/1 ready pods. All key facts from the known facts were correctly identified and reported.
